docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,393.10 FILED BY MISSIRLIAN, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT KLOTZ, HILDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISSIRLIAN, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KLOTZ, HILDA $5,393.10 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,613.10, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT FULLY PAY FOR DENTAL TREATMENT, AND THAT HE IS ENTITLED TO THE AMOUNT CLAIMED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$145.00);DOCUMENT LABELED - "FILED BY FAX" SERVED MAY-12-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KLOTZ, HILDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF DONALD MISSIRLIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HILDA KLOTZ IS NOT PRESENT. COURT UPDATED DEFENDANT'S MAILING ADDRESS ON FILE TO "737 E FRANCISCO AVE #182, SAN RAFAEL, CA 94901" AS PLAINTIFF STATES THAT IS NEW ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT WHERE SHE HAS BEEN SUB-SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSIRLIAN, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT KLOTZ, HILDA
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSIRLIAN, DONALD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.
